quote: The truth is not something outside to be discovered, it is something inside to be realized.
Freedom begins when you see that you are not the thinker.
Peace comes from within. Do not seek it without.
Nature does not hurry, yet everything is accomplished.
He who has a why to live can bear almost any how.
The soul is healed by being with children.
A book must be the axe for the frozen sea within us.
Everyone thinks of changing the world, but no one thinks of changing himself.
Your pain is the breaking of the shell that encloses your understanding.
Be realistic: plan for a miracle.
To understand yourself is the beginning of wisdom.
What you think, you become.
Silence is a source of great strength.
Become who you are.
The darker the night, the brighter the stars.
Paths are made by walking.
If you want to be happy, be.
Out of suffering have emerged the strongest souls.
Life begins where fear ends.
Observation without evaluation is the highest form of intelligence.
Holding onto anger is like drinking poison and expecting the other person to die.
He who knows others is wise; he who knows himself is enlightened.
In individuals, insanity is rare; but in groups, parties, nations, it is the rule.
Love in action is a harsh and dreadful thing compared to love in dreams.
I am free, and that is why I am lost.
Wrong does not cease to be wrong because the majority share in it.
When you love, you should not say ‘God is in my heart,’ but rather, ‘I am in the heart of God.’
The moment you accept yourself, you become beautiful.
It is no measure of health to be well adjusted to a profoundly sick society.
Three things cannot be long hidden: the sun, the moon, and the truth.
When I let go of what I am, I become what I might be.
He who fights with monsters should be careful lest he thereby become a monster.
Pain and suffering are always inevitable for a large intelligence.
You do not need to leave your room. Remain sitting at your table and listen.
We can know only that we know nothing.
Sadness is but a wall between two gardens.
Be — don’t try to become.
Truth is a pathless land.
Every morning we are born again. What we do today is what matters most.
At the center of your being you have the answer.
That which does not kill us makes us stronger.
To live without hope is to cease to live.
I am constantly trying to communicate something incommunicable.
All, everything that I understand, I understand only because I love.
Beauty is eternity gazing at itself in a mirror.
Love is the goal, life is the journey.
The ability to observe without distortion is intelligence.
What we are today comes from our thoughts of yesterday.
Act without expectation.
Hope in reality is the worst of all evils because it prolongs the torments of man.
